action.reasoning: Observation: the current drop fix only acts while facing the final target; after turning toward an empty neighbor it falls through and turns back toward the target instead of dropping. Analysis: this creates oscillation or repeated pickup while carrying a key, so KeyCorridor/UnlockPickup still fail. Decision: patch the final pickup branch so that when carrying a non-target object and adjacent to the pickup target, the planner drops immediately if facing any empty cell, otherwise turns toward an empty adjacent cell; then run the failing-env debug rollout and submit evaluation.
